gt_sql: SELECT `aCL IgA`, `aCL IgG`, `aCL IgM` FROM Examination WHERE ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM Patient WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND Description = '1994-02-19' ) AND `Examination Date` = '1993-11-12'
pred_sql:
SELECT e."aCL IgA", e."aCL IgG", e."aCL IgM"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
  AND p.Description = '1994-02-19'
  AND e."Examination Date" = '1993-11-12';
question: For the patient who was diagnosed with SLE on 1994/2/19, what was his/her anti-Cardiolipin antibody concentration status on 1993/11/12?
